task_name: Tampa City Council – Summarize Public Comments
notes: Exceptional performance. All 16 speakers correctly identified with accurate topics and agenda items. Each summary includes speaker name, topic/item, key points, and specific requests/demands with precise detail. Thematic grouping is sophisticated and well-justified (e.g., identifying historical preservation as highest-interest topic with 5 coordinated speakers on Zion/Colon cemeteries). Document organization is professional: clear header, consistent formatting, chronological speaker summaries, followed by comprehensive thematic analysis. Agent went beyond minimum requirements by providing detailed context and cross-referencing related speakers. No errors or omissions detected.
